generation_label: expressive original cartoon cat and dog mascots
summary: Original expressive cat-and-dog mascots with bold silhouettes, thick dark outlines, readable faces, playful asymmetry, and a coherent shared cast.
composition_principles: keep all characters in one original visual family
use broad colour masses rather than micro-patterns

route_a.objective: Create a seamless crowd pattern of original mascot heads with no single required focal character.
composition_rules: continue partial silhouettes across opposite edges

route_b.objective: Create one weapon-level mascot scene with semantic roles for the hero and supporting cast.

component_roles.stock: two or three supporting mascot faces
component_roles.pistol_grip: dark grounding colour with one simple paw accent
component_roles.handguard: broad graphic connectors and small mascot accents

candidate_directions.title: Garage Crew
candidate_directions.concept: A mechanic cat leads a cheerful workshop crew.
candidate_directions.route_a_emphasis: many workshop expressions form the repeat
candidate_directions.route_b_emphasis: mechanic cat is the receiver hero and the sidekick occupies the magazine

candidate_directions.title: Midnight Couriers
candidate_directions.concept: Courier cats and dogs race through a playful night shift.
candidate_directions.route_a_emphasis: alternating courier faces and motion accents
candidate_directions.route_b_emphasis: a longitudinal chase scene guides the whole weapon

candidate_directions.title: Snack Patrol
candidate_directions.concept: Serious-looking mascots secretly guard colourful snacks.
candidate_directions.route_a_emphasis: expression contrast drives a lively repeat
candidate_directions.route_b_emphasis: hero and sidekick interaction forms the receiver-magazine narrative

candidate_directions.title: Space Watch
candidate_directions.concept: A small original animal crew monitors a whimsical night station.
candidate_directions.route_a_emphasis: helmeted faces alternate with sparse control lights
candidate_directions.route_b_emphasis: the receiver is the command deck and the handguard carries a controlled star trail

evaluation_criteria: absence of copied IP and forbidden content
reference_policy: Use references only for high-level density, readability, and expression vocabulary; never copy characters, poses, costumes, text, or arrangement.
